name: clawbounties-assurance-decision-policy-v1
description: Promote compiled evidence from reviewer context into deterministic requester, arena, and autopilot decision policy for Clawbounties.

userStories.title: Canonical compiled-evidence decision evaluator
userStories.description: As the marketplace, I need a single compiled-evidence decision evaluator so requester approval, arena desk loops, and autopilot all consume the same authoritative decision posture.
acceptanceCriteria: A reusable evaluator derives deterministic decision states such as approve_recommended, manual_review_required, fix_required, or unavailable from compiled evidence summary state
Authoritative pass vs authoritative non-pass vs authoritative unverified/invalid are mapped explicitly and conservatively
Reference-only or narrative-only compiled evidence never produces an authoritative green decision state
Evaluator emits machine-readable reason codes and boundary warnings for downstream requester/arena/autopilot flows

userStories.title: Requester approval override contract
userStories.description: As a requester, I need approval to fail closed or require explicit acknowledgement when compiled evidence is not decision-green so overrides are intentional and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Requester approval consumes the canonical compiled-evidence decision evaluator
fix_required posture blocks approval fail closed with deterministic error codes and structured decision details
manual_review_required posture requires an explicit override contract (for example an acknowledgement or override note) before approval succeeds
Approval responses preserve the compiled-evidence decision view and any override note without overstating non-authoritative evidence

userStories.title: Arena desk decision policy adoption
userStories.description: As ops, I need arena desk decision loops to respect compiled-evidence decision posture so auto-approval and auto-rejection stay consistent with reviewer policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Arena desk loops consume the canonical compiled-evidence decision evaluator for each candidate submission
Auto-approval only happens when payout policy is green and compiled-evidence policy is approve_recommended
manual_review_required posture stays skipped/manual in automation modes instead of silently auto-approving
Decision-loop outputs expose deterministic compiled-evidence policy reason codes and policy snapshots

userStories.title: Manager autopilot compiled-evidence guardrails
userStories.description: As marketplace ops, I need manager autopilot to fail closed to manual review when the latest compiled evidence is not green so routing automation cannot outrun assurance posture.
acceptanceCriteria: Manager autopilot status depends on compiled-evidence decision posture in addition to existing win-rate, circuit-breaker, and fleet gates
Latest compiled-evidence non-pass or unverified posture forces manual_review_required instead of auto_route_enabled
Autopilot payloads expose compiled-evidence decision state and reason codes explicitly
Compiled-evidence guardrails remain additive to existing route/circuit/fleet checks and do not weaken other fail-closed gates

userStories.title: Decision snapshots and override audit surfaces
userStories.description: As reviewers and operators, I need the marketplace to persist what compiled-evidence decision posture existed at approval/reject/autopilot time so overrides and automation can be audited later.
acceptanceCriteria: Requester approval/reject and automated desk/autopilot paths persist compact decision snapshots tied to the relevant submission or arena action
Snapshots include decision state, reason codes, authoritative-vs-non-authoritative boundary markers, and any explicit override note when present
Submission, bounty, arena, or admin/operator surfaces expose the latest decision snapshot without dumping raw compiled artifacts
Audit surfaces remain deterministic and cannot imply authoritative approval from narrative-only or reference-only evidence
